ddls:
CREATE TABLE "visits" (
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visit */,
  "visitor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the visitor who made the visit */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the visitor */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the visitor */,
  "geolocation" TEXT /* Geographic location of the visitor */,
  "pages" INTEGER /* Number of pages viewed during the visit */,
  "hits" INTEGER /* Number of hits (requests) made during the visit */,
  "bandwidth" TEXT /* Bandwidth consumed during the visit */,
  "last_visit" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last visit */,
  "website_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the website or application visited */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the entire visit in seconds */,
  "referral_source" TEXT /* Source from which the visitor was referred */,
  "is_secure" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the visit was over HTTPS */,
  "is_bot" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the visitor is a bot */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile, tablet) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visits_website_id FOREIGN KEY ("website_id") REFERENCES websites ("website_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visits_visitor_id FOREIGN KEY ("visitor_id") REFERENCES visitors ("visitor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visitors" (
  "visitor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visitor */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the visitor */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the visitor */,
  "geolocation" TEXT /* Geographic location of the visitor */,
  "is_known" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the visitor is known (registered user) or unknown */,
  "first_visit" TEXT /* Timestamp of the first visit */,
  "last_visit" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last visit */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user in the users table if the visitor is known */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the visitor (if known) */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the visitor (if known) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the visitor (if known) */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the visitor (if known) */,
  "company" TEXT /* Company name of the visitor (if known) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visitor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visitors_user_agent FOREIGN KEY ("user_agent") REFERENCES user_agents ("user_agent_string"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visitors_geolocation FOREIGN KEY ("geolocation") REFERENCES geolocations ("ip_address")
)

CREATE TABLE "websites" (
  "website_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each website or application */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the website or application */,
  "domain" TEXT /* Domain or URL of the website or application */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the website or application */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the website or application */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the website was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the website was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the website is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("website_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pages" (
  "page_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each page */,
  "website_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the website or application the page belongs to */,
  "page_url" TEXT /* URL of the page */,
  "page_title" TEXT /* Title of the page */,
  "page_description" TEXT /* Description of the page */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the page was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the page was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the page is currently active */,
  "page_type" TEXT /* Type of the page (e.g., article, product, blog) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("page_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pages_website_id FOREIGN KEY ("website_id") REFERENCES websites ("website_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "page_views" (
  "view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each page view */,
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the visit during which the page was viewed */,
  "page_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the page that was viewed */,
  "view_date" TEXT /* Timestamp of the page view */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the page view in seconds */,
  "scroll_depth" INTEGER /* Percentage of the page viewed */,
  "clicks" INTEGER /* Number of clicks on the page */,
  "interactions" INTEGER /* Number of interactions (e.g., form submissions, button clicks) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("view_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_page_views_visit_id FOREIGN KEY ("visit_id") REFERENCES visits ("visit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_page_views_page_id FOREIGN KEY ("page_id") REFERENCES pages ("page_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_agents" (
  "user_agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user agent */,
  "user_agent_string" TEXT /* User agent string */,
  "browser" TEXT /* Name of the browser */,
  "os" TEXT /* Name of the operating system */,
  "device" TEXT /* Type of device (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "is_mobile" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user agent is from a mobile device */,
  "is_tablet" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user agent is from a tablet */,
  "is_bot" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user agent is a bot */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geolocations" (
  "geolocation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geolocation */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the visitor */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the visitor */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the visitor */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the visitor */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the geolocation */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the geolocation */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the geolocation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("geolocation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., marketing, IT) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, report generation) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user accessing the system */,
  "geolocation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the geolocation of the user accessing the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_geolocation_id FOREIGN KEY ("geolocation_id") REFERENCES geolocations ("geolocation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., daily, monthly) */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date and time the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the report file in bytes */,
  "is_shared" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the report is shared with others */,
  "shared_with" TEXT /* List of user IDs with whom the report is shared */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "security_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each security event */,
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the visit during which the security event occurred */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of security event (e.g., suspicious activity, potential threat) */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the security event */,
  "event_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the security event occurred */,
  "is_resolved" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the security event has been resolved */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who resolved the event */,
  "resolution_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_security_events_visit_id FOREIGN KEY ("visit_id") REFERENCES visits ("visit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_security_events_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
